channel.title: Çağatay Özcan Jagiello Gutt - Thoughts & Updates
channel.description: Cognitive Science Student (M.Sc.) & Molecular Biologist (B.Sc.) | Artificial Consciousness, BCI & HMI Research | Physiological Computing & AI

item.title: Project Update: AnalysisToolbox
item.author: Unknown
item.description:
Recent activity in AnalysisToolbox:

Recent Commits

  • c51f75a Enhance peak detection processor and analyzers:
  • ff0297c Fix: handle string 'None' literal in peak detection arg parsing
  • 0205701 Move ic_analyzer/extracting_processor withName overrides out of generic config (
  • 030c136 Create output .bin dir before writing pipeline log
  • 50c8613 Fix anova_merger label:path crash; add IOInterface CLI to plv_analyzer

This project is actively maintained as part of my commitment to open and transparent science.

View on GitHub → | See all projects →

item.title: Project Update: surveyWorkbench
item.author: Unknown
item.description:
Recent activity in surveyWorkbench:

Recent Commits

  • 790135e Update USER_MANUAL files with latest build timestamps
  • 1071529 Update survey workbench v2.0 binaries and warning log
  • fda7dc5 Derive target row from participant ID number (001->row2, 023->row24)
  • 0e23800 Fix case-insensitive sheet lookup; keep workbook open after extraction
  • 80fd4a1 Update binaries and fix warnings in survey_workbench_v2.0

This project is actively maintained as part of my commitment to open and transparent science.

View on GitHub → | See all projects →

item.title: Website Update
item.author: Unknown
item.description:
This website has been updated with the following changes:

Recent Changes

  • 8106f62 feat: add table renderer for ANOVA stats output
  • 0360cf1 fix: render error bars for flat y_var arrays (EDA/HRV/FAI)
  • 4146223 fix: remove DE sub-pages and lang toggle from static tool pages
  • 446f275 fix: add GitRef to nav, rename Analysis Toolbox -> GitAtbx in base.html, remove
  • dd818b5 feat: add German versions of GitRef and GitAtbx tool pages

The site continues to sync automatically with GitHub (projects) and ORCID (publications).

View source on GitHub →

item.title: Welcome to My Research Hub
item.author: Unknown
item.description:
This website serves as my central scientific presence, automatically syncing with GitHub (active projects), ORCID (publications), and other platforms.

What to Expect

This blog will feature:

  • Research updates — Progress on neural-autonomic synchrony and consciousness research
  • Volt engagement — Data analytics and digital policy insights
  • Technical insights — Tools, methods, and open science practices
  • CCC reflections — Digital rights and technological transparency

Philosophy

Everything here operates on principles of open and transparent science. Code, data, and ideas are shared to advance collaborative knowledge.

To add new posts, simply create a markdown file in content/blog/ with this format and commit to GitHub.
